name: Athena

skills.name: Divine Awakening
skills.description: Able to move in true form after dying. Deals damage and launches enemies in range when resurrected.Deals extra damage to non-hero units.

skills.name: Holy Advance
skills.description: Dashes ahead with shield up, knocking back the enemy and dealing damagewhile gaining a shield that grants crowd control immunity.

skills.name: Unstoppable Spear
skills.description: Shifts in the target direction and enhances the next Basic Attack, chargingand dealing damage to the enemy. Hitting the same target 3 timessuccessively deals extra damage equal to lost Health.

skills.name: Immovable Aegis
skills.description: Raises a shield that grants crowd control immunity. Damage taken while theshield is up will be returned after a brief delay, dealing damage to enemieswithin range.

tips: Athena (Assassin): Tier B on international ranked — 54.4% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Rapacious Bite.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 54.4%, pick 0.08%, ban 0.01%, popularity tier B.
Counters Dharma, Gao Changgong · Weak into Sun Bin, Guan Yu.

faqs.question: Is Athena good in current season?
faqs.answer: Athena is Tier B Assassin with 54.4% win rate, 0.08% pick rate, and 0.01% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Athena build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Rapacious Bite, Meteor, Axe of Torment, Dragon's Rage. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Athena?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Athena: Sun Bin, Guan Yu. Athena is strong into Dharma, Gao Changgong.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dharma, Gao Changgong. Countered by: Sun Bin, Guan Yu.
